description: Aerial photograph captured by SPOT-5 on 2010-06-03, depicting an agricultural landscape identified as a vineyard at Oestrich-Winkel, Germany. The image has a 2.5 m resolution and uses a 1/2/3 Band Combination. It shows a mosaic of small, irregularly shaped land parcels, many exhibiting linear patterns consistent with row cultivation, characteristic of vineyards, alongside areas of exposed, high-reflectance soil. Scattered clusters of buildings indicate small rural settlements, interconnected by visible tracks and roads. The overall colour palette includes shades of green, brown, and beige, reflecting varying vegetation cover and soil conditions. The source of the image is CNES 2010©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
